class.name: ResonanceRuntime
class.brief_description: Scene node that initializes [ResonanceServer], applies [ResonanceRuntimeConfig], and ticks the Steam Audio simulation.
class.description: Add one ResonanceRuntime to your scene and assign a [ResonanceRuntimeConfig]. It initializes the native server in play mode, sets bake params, and calls [method ResonanceServer.tick] each frame. [b]Static geometry:[/b] Every [ResonanceStaticScene] under the scene tree root with a valid [member ResonanceStaticScene.static_scene_asset] is loaded additively when the server exposes [code]clear_static_scenes[/code] and [code]add_static_scene_from_asset[/code]. After [method ResonanceServer.reinit_audio_engine] (for example after [ResonanceRuntimeConfig] frame size or reflection type changes while the game runs), the same multi-scene reload runs so occlusion, transmission, and pathing still see the full combined static mesh.
